source: User-pasted Google Maps listing for COAST Brewing Company, approved by user; menu PDF (Menu+July+2026.pdf) re-analyzed after original analysis was lost during an earlier session context compaction.

location.name: COAST Brewing Company
location.description: Straightforward neighborhood brewery featuring tours plus samples of its craft beers.

food: Meat & Cheese Plate ($20/28): selection of cured meats and cheeses with house-made pickles, beer mustard, pepper cheese, whipped tallow butter, crackers + pickles
Tallow Fried Wisconsin Cheese Curds ($11), buttermilk ranch or bloody mary ketchup
Roasted Cauliflower (V) ($13): smoked olive oil, tahini, lemon, chili flake
Tallow Fried Crispy Potatoes ($8): buttermilk ranch or bloody mary ketchup
Carpaccio* ($20): thin sliced raw C.A.B beef, parmesan, parsley, lemon, bierjonnaise, rye crisps
Chicken Wings ($12/$23): Joyce Farms chicken, Kölsch brined, tossed with buffalo sauce or lemon pepper + clarified butter, celery, house ranch or blue cheese, tallow fried
Fried Bologna Sandwich ($15): house smoked grassfed thin sliced bologna, provolone, pickled green tomatoes, Alabama white sauce, Normandy bun
Grassfed Hot Dogs (1 for $10/2 for $18): Chicago style (tomato, onion, pickle, sport pepper, poppy seed) or house sauerkraut & beer mustard
COAST Grassfed Burger ($19): double stacked 4oz patties, American cheese, griddled onions, special sauce, Normandy Bakery bun; add tallow fried potatoes +$3
Single Patty COAST Burger ($13); add tallow fried cheese curds +$4
Green Chorizo Tacos (3) ($16): Peculiar Pig Farms heritage pork, onion, cilantro, roasted tomato salsa, corn tortillas
allergyRelevantNotes: Menu states: 'All dressings and sauces are house made without seed oils.'
Fried items (cheese curds, crispy potatoes, chicken wings) are 'tallow fried' — i.e. fried in beef tallow, not peanut or other seed oil.
Kids quesadilla uses corn tortillas (naturally gluten-free); green chorizo tacos also use corn tortillas.

No dedicated allergen guide or per-item allergen labeling; standard raw/undercooked-food disclaimer only ('Consuming raw or undercooked Meats Poultry Seafood or Eggs increase your risk of foodborne illness').
Most sandwiches/burgers use Normandy Bakery bread/buns (wheat/gluten); no gluten-free bun substitute mentioned.
